problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Aerogel. Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
